character_names.description: Elegant serif display font for main character names.

category_names.description: Semi-display serif for tabs and categories.

item_names.description: Classic serif for item names, gives a ledger/book feel.

metadata_and_numbers.description: Condensed industrial mono-like font for quantities, stats, and small dropdown titles.

Grandmaster.description: white shining text with glow effect

layout.general: Minimalist tabular layout, SkyUI style. Tab navigation along the top. Large content area below. Generous padding.
layout.top_bar: Contains the copy-paste import/export tool and version info. Sticky.
layout.header: Profile picture slot (square) top left. Character name next to it in Cinzel font.
layout.tabs: Left to right category tabs (Weapons, Armor, Consumables, etc.). Use Marcellus font. Underline active state.
layout.left_sidebar_or_action_area: Large 'New Item' button on the left side, metallic brushed border.
layout.inventory_list: Tabular or row-based layout. Items stack vertically. Hovering reveals actions.

item_row.structure: Quantity (stack multiplier like '2x'), Item Name, Price (indeterminate tooltip by default). Small gear icon top right of row for settings.
item_row.expansion: Clicking an item slides down a dropdown below it, pushing siblings down. This dropdown contains editable info fields.

components.buttons: Minimalist. Charcoal backgrounds with 1px pewter border. Hover effect: background lightens slightly, border turns silver. No heavy rounding, max rounded-sm.
components.inputs: Dark background (#0D0D0F), 1px dark border (#2A2A2E). Focus state: pewter border. Oswald font for numeric inputs.
components.dropdown_accordion: Framer motion for height sliding. Darker background (#050505) inside the dropdown to differentiate from the row (#121214).
components.icons: lucide-react. Size 16px to 20px. Stroke width 1.5. Colors: pewter or silver.
components.context_menu: Right-click custom menu. Very dark background (#050505), sharp corners, silver text hover states.

interactions_and_motion.drag_and_drop: Use dnd-kit or react-beautiful-dnd. Items can be dragged between categories (tabs) and reordered. Visual feedback: slight scale up and drop shadow while dragging.
interactions_and_motion.accordion: Smooth height transition when expanding item details.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Rows should subtly change background color on hover. Tooltips appear after 300ms delay.

technical_instructions.stack: React, Tailwind CSS, LocalStorage (offline-first). No backend.
technical_instructions.autosave: Implement a hook to save to localStorage every 2 minutes and on window beforeunload event.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
technical_instructions.custom_css: Inject the Google Fonts import in index.css. Setup Tailwind config to extend the font families.

image_urls.description: Default avatar for character profile picture.
Dark metal texture, can be used subtly as a background overlay with very low opacity (e.g., 5%) if needed for the industrial vibe.
